overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a stormy waterfront harbor at dusk. The character moves from a quiet cobblestone riverside path up stone stairs to a busy dock area with tall sailing ships, wooden carts, and NPC townspeople.

scene_state.functional_zone: quiet riverside walkway between stone wall and water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside the river, approaching a stone staircase

entered.detail: large stone building with dark walls running along the left side of the path
low stone wall separating the path from the building
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the water's edge
calm water body with stone embankment
stone stairs leading upward visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path between a stone harbor building on the left and a river on the right. Tall cypress trees line the water's edge under an overcast dusk sky. The path leads toward a stone staircase in the distance, with no other people visible in this quiet waterfront section.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with wooden well shelter

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs to upper level
reaches top of stairs and enters terrace area with wooden well structure

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and walking past a wooden well shelter on the upper terrace

notable_agents.action: shirtless man standing against the building wall

entered.detail: wooden roofed structure with stone base, likely a water well

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs to an upper terrace level, passing a wooden well shelter. A shirtless NPC stands near the building wall on the left. The river and trees are now behind and below as the character moves onto the elevated dock area with sparser vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy harbor dock with sailing ships and wooden cargo carts

events.description: entering the main harbor area with large sailing ships and dock workers visible
passing through denser crowd of NPCs and wooden cargo barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the crowded dockside passing townspeople and wooden cargo carts, approaching the tall ships

notable_agents.action: man in red tunic walking alongside the character
group of dock workers gathered near the ship gangplank

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with tall masts docked at the harbor
wooden cargo carts and wheelbarrows lined along the building
wooden fences and posts along the water edge
tall wooden crane structure for loading cargo onto ships

segments.scene_description: The character enters the bustling harbor dock area where tall sailing ships are moored. The stone building remains on the left while wooden cargo carts and barriers line the path. Moderate crowds of NPCs walk along the dock, and a large sailing ship with furled sails dominates the center view. The atmosphere is busy with dock workers and townspeople moving about the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded riverside path that gradually opens into a bustling harbor dock. It begins by trailing the character along a narrow cobblestone walkway between a stone building and a river lined with cypress trees under an overcast dusk sky. As the character reaches the end of the path, the camera ascends a set of stone stairs past a wooden well shelter, leaving the quiet waterfront behind for an elevated terrace. The scene then expands into a crowded dock area where the quiet atmosphere shifts to a busy hub filled with townspeople and dock workers. Finally, the view opens up to reveal wooden cargo carts and towering sailing ships with furled sails moored along the waterfront.
